title: rust bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.88.0-1]
- Update to Rust 1.88.0

[1.87.0-1]
- Update to Rust 1.87.0

[1.86.0-2]
- Temporarily skip PGO on RHEL ppc64le

[1.86.0-1]
- Update to Rust 1.86.0

[1.85.0-2]
- Temporarily skip PGO on s390x

[1.85.0-1]
- Update to Rust 1.85.0
